site_tagline.name: site_tagline
site_tagline.default: 'A digital Sistine Chapel for Catholic formation.'

catechist_rate_limit_refusal_message.name: catechist_rate_limit_refusal_message
catechist_rate_limit_refusal_message.default: 'You''ve asked many questions in a short time. Please rest and return shortly.'

hero_subheadline.name: hero_subheadline
hero_subheadline.default: 'Tantum Ergo holds three instruments inside one reverent surface — a cartographic Miracle Atlas, a long-form Doctrine LMS, and an AI Catechist bound to citation. Mobile-first. Scroll-scrubbed. Built to last centuries.'

pillars_atlas_intent.name: pillars_atlas_intent
pillars_atlas_intent.default: 'A 3D cartography of approved miracles — Eucharistic, Marian, healings — anchored to coordinates, dates, and the ecclesial record.'

pillars_doctrine_intent.name: pillars_doctrine_intent
pillars_doctrine_intent.default: 'A breviary-paced LMS over councils, encyclicals, the Catechism.'

pillars_catechist_intent.name: pillars_catechist_intent
pillars_catechist_intent.default: 'An interlocutor bound to citation. Cites; never invents.'
